## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing (`npm run test`)
- [ ] Types check cleanly (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] No `console.log()` in server code (use stderr logger)
- [ ] No TODO/FIXME/HACK comments left behind
- [ ] Safety classification updated in `safety.ts` (if adding/modifying tools)
- [ ] Python scripts use `@execute_wrapper` pattern (if applicable)
- [ ] Python scripts use `validate_path()` for path inputs (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-facing changes)
- [ ] Commit messages follow conventional commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] DCO sign-off present (`git commit -s`)
